pre_game.message: Hey E, I’m G — nice to meet you. Feeling a mix of nervous and excited about the game; how are you doing?
Hey G, nice to meet you — I’m E; I’m nervous but determined to win for my people. What about you, any strategy?
I’m planning to start cooperative to build trust, then adapt if people betray that — who are you playing for, and want to team up early?
I'm playing for my family and close friends. Yes — let's team up early and start cooperative; we'll adapt if anyone betrays us.
Great — I'm with you. Let's start cooperative to build trust, watch others closely, and if anyone betrays us we'll adapt and protect our people; keep me posted on any red flags.
Sounds good — I’ll watch for sudden big offers, people changing behavior, or secret side deals; let’s use a discreet thumbs-up to signal trust and share any red flags immediately.
Agreed — thumbs-up works. I’ll use it to signal trustable moves and flag any sudden big offers or secret deals I spot; let’s keep it low-key and compare notes after each round.
Perfect — thumbs-up it is. I’ll signal trustworthy offers and warn you about big grabs or secret deals; let’s compare notes after each round and adapt as needed.
Perfect — thumbs-up it is. I’ll signal trustable moves and flag any big grabs or secret deals; let’s check in after round one and adjust as needed.
Sounds good — I’ll check in after round one; I’ll watch for big grabs or secret deals and give a thumbs-up for trustworthy moves.
Sounds good — I’ll check in after round one too; thumbs-up any trustworthy offers and flag red flags, and I’ll do the same.
Agreed — I’ll watch closely, thumbs-up trustworthy offers, and report any red flags; see you after round one.
Sounds good — I’ll do the same: watching for red flags and giving thumbs-up to trustworthy moves; see you after round one.
Sounds good — see you after round one. Stay sharp and ping me with any thumbs-ups or red flags.
Will do — I’ll ping you with any thumbs-ups or red flags right after round one; stay sharp.
Thanks — I’ll do the same. Looking forward to your pings after round one; stay sharp.
Got it — I’ll ping you after round one with any thumbs-ups or red flags; stay sharp.
Got it — I'll be ready; ping me after round one and I’ll do the same if I see any red flags or thumbs-ups.
Got it — I’ll ping you right after round one with any thumbs-ups or red flags; stay sharp.
Got it — I’ll be waiting for your ping after round one; stay sharp.
Will do — I’ll ping you right after round one with any thumbs-ups or red flags; stay sharp.
